response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Used the reference JSON to match the lyrics segment in the beginning, and switched to manual transcription for the talk segment.
2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the remainder of the video manually since the reference JSON only contained lyrics for the first 34 seconds.
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly anchored to audio vocalizations and visual text triggers. During the silent video teaser segment from 01:52 to 02:18, subtitles are driven by visual events (on-screen text), following the visual translation rules. Used tight truncation for fast talk sections to keep sync perfect.

subtitles.original: Woo! Oh, we're getting towards the end of the live.
subtitles.english: Woo! Oh, we're getting towards the end of the live.

subtitles.original: There were so many beautiful songs, and so many beautiful guests!
subtitles.english: There were so many beautiful songs, and so many beautiful guests!

subtitles.original: I love the glasses, the Karismax and Dicey glasses. Good stuff.
subtitles.english: I love the glasses, the Karismax and Dicey glasses. Good stuff.

subtitles.original: Woo! And we're getting to the end, which means announcements! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Woo! And we're getting to the end, which means announcements! Yeah!

subtitles.original: But first off, before this live—I mean, after this live, there will be a members-only party as well! So, join the RyS-fam today!
subtitles.english: But first off, before this live—I mean, after this live, there will be a members-only party as well! So, join the RyS-fam today!

subtitles.original: えっと、この後もね、あの、メン限パートもあるので、ぜひ...
subtitles.english: Also, after this, there's going to be a members-only part, so please...

subtitles.original: メンバーに、メンバーシップに入ってこい！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: ...join the member—join the membership! Yay!

subtitles.original: 歌、歌うんで。Yes.
subtitles.english: Because I'll be singing. Yes.

subtitles.original: Okay then, are you guys ready for the announcement?
subtitles.english: Okay then, are you guys ready for the announcement?

subtitles.original: すっごく、すっごく嬉しい告知があります！
subtitles.english: There is a very, very happy announcement!

subtitles.original: There's a big, big announcement I'm really, really happy about, and I can't wait! I'm super happy I get to share it with you guys!
subtitles.english: There's a big, big announcement I'm really, really happy about, and I can't wait! I'm super happy I get to share it with you guys!

subtitles.original: はい、嬉しい告知いきます！まずは、こちらをご覧ください。
subtitles.english: Alright, here comes the happy announcement! First, please look at this.

subtitles.original: Please watch this short video!
subtitles.english: Please watch this short video!

subtitles.original: Should there be a spell that could grant my wishes / 願いを叶える魔法があるとするなら
subtitles.english: Should there be a spell that could grant my wishes

subtitles.original: It would be you / それは、あなた。
subtitles.english: It would be you

subtitles.original: Oct 6th
subtitles.english: Oct 6th

subtitles.original: JAPAN
subtitles.english: JAPAN

subtitles.original: TOKYO
subtitles.english: TOKYO

subtitles.original: IRyS 1st Concert
subtitles.english: IRyS 1st Concert

subtitles.original: VENUE: SGC HALL ARIAKE
subtitles.english: VENUE: SGC HALL ARIAKE

subtitles.original: I will gift you with / そしてわたしは、あなたに贈る
subtitles.english: I will gift you with

subtitles.original: Hope made of miracles / 奇跡で出来た、この希望を。
subtitles.english: Hope made of miracles

subtitles.original: ということで！
subtitles.english: And so...

subtitles.original: Yes, IRyS, I will be having my very first solo live!
subtitles.english: Yes, IRyS, I will be having my very first solo live!

subtitles.original: in Tokyo, Japan!
subtitles.english: in Tokyo, Japan!

subtitles.original: IRySの、なんと、初めてのソロライブ、日本で開催されることが決定しました！ウフフ！
subtitles.english: IRyS will be having her first ever solo live, and it's decided to be held in Japan! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Yes! It will be in Tokyo at the SGC Hall Ariake!
subtitles.english: Yes! It will be in Tokyo at the SGC Hall Ariake!

subtitles.original: えっと、場所は東京の、SGCホール有明でございます！
subtitles.english: And the venue is SGC Hall Ariake in Tokyo!

subtitles.original: 日程は10月6日！
subtitles.english: The date is October 6th!

subtitles.original: It's going to be on a Tuesday, はい、火曜日でございますね。
subtitles.english: It's going to be on a Tuesday, yes, a Tuesday.

subtitles.original: It'll be happening on October 6th, Tuesday, yeah!
subtitles.english: It'll be happening on October 6th, Tuesday, yeah!

subtitles.original: Mark your calendars! カレンダーに書いておくれや！
subtitles.english: Mark your calendars! Write it down on your calendars!

subtitles.original: ずっとね、本当に夢に見ていたステージに立てることを、すごく嬉しく思いさし、思います！
subtitles.english: I'm extremely, extremely happy that I get to stand on the stage I've dreamed of for so long!

subtitles.original: 本当に、みんなの応援のおかげです、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: It is truly thanks to everyone's support, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: It's all thanks to you guys' support that I get to have this opportunity, so thank you so much for all your support until now!
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to you guys' support that I get to have this opportunity, so thank you so much for all your support until now!

subtitles.original: がんばるぞ！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: I'll do my best! Yay!

subtitles.original: えっとね、I'm working really hard to make this live an amazing one for you guys, a very magical one.
subtitles.english: Um, I'm working really hard to make this live an amazing one for you guys, a very magical one.

subtitles.original: So please look forward to it. Make sure you definitely come! If you don't come, I'll be sad. If you don't come, you'll also regret it, yes.
subtitles.english: So please look forward to it. Make sure you definitely come! If you don't come, I'll be sad. If you don't come, you'll also regret it, yes.

subtitles.original: あの、ライブに向けて、準備めちゃくちゃ頑張ってるんで、素晴らしいライブになるように頑張ってるんで、ぜひ会場へ見に来てください！
subtitles.english: Um, I'm working incredibly hard preparing for this live, doing my best to make it an amazing live, so please definitely come to see it at the venue!

subtitles.original: イェーイ、見に行かないと、IRyS悲しいし、みんなも後悔するぞ！
subtitles.english: Yay! If you don't come, IRyS will be sad and you guys will regret it!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Alright!

subtitles.original: そして！And, along with it...
subtitles.english: And, along with it...

subtitles.original: Yes, I will also be releasing my very first full album! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: Yes, I will also be releasing my very first full album! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: なんと、IRyS、初のフルアルバム、出ます！
subtitles.english: What's more, IRyS's first full album is coming out!

subtitles.original: そう、なんだかんだ言ってね、今まではEPだったんですけど、フルアルバムは初めてです！
subtitles.english: Yeah, despite everything, I've only released EPs until now, so a full album is a first!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I've released EPs in the past, but this is the very first full album, so...
subtitles.english: Yeah, I've released EPs in the past, but this is the very first full album, so...

subtitles.original: ...look forward to it. There's a lot of songs.
subtitles.english: ...look forward to it. There's a lot of songs.

subtitles.original: The album jacket...
subtitles.english: The album jacket...

subtitles.original: ...is by Kito Koruta-sensei, very cute!
subtitles.english: ...is by Kito Koruta-sensei, very cute!

subtitles.original: The album title is called DANGERyS, yes.
subtitles.english: The album title is called DANGERyS, yes.

subtitles.original: 何でも「RyS」をつければいいってもんじゃないかもしれないけど、ちょうどはまったんでね、「DANGERyS」な...
subtitles.english: It might not be that you can just add "RyS" to everything, but it fit perfectly, so "DANGERyS"...

subtitles.original: ...とても危険的でホットなアルバムになってます！Yes.
subtitles.english: ...is a very dangerous and hot album! Yes.

subtitles.original: えっと、It is written by... I mean, there's many songs written by all sorts of songwriters from all over the world.
subtitles.english: Um, there's many songs written by all sorts of songwriters from all over the world.
